rationale.D1: Confirmed abstract `Mechanism` base reused across all TalonFX mechanisms (good library-grade reuse of control patterns) but no per-subsystem `*IO` interfaces with swappable Real/Sim implementations; vendor types (CTRE) live directly in every subsystem — discounted IO layer, scored as vendored abstraction at level 2.
rationale.D2: Confirmed `Coordinator.applyRobotState(State)` as a real goal-fanout coordinator that fans robot-wide `State` enum values out to all mechanism `*States` classes; `State` enum defines sequencing logic; discounted level 4 as no search/graph pathfinding over states.
rationale.D3: Confirmed maple-sim `MapleSimSwerveDrivetrain` wired in `Swerve`, WPILib `SingleJointedArmSim` in `ArmSim`, `IntakeSimulation` and game-piece projectile physics in `RobotSim`; full whole-robot sim workflow present; discounted level 4 as no replay IO variants.
rationale.D4: Confirmed no `src/test` directory and no `@Test` or `assertEquals` calls anywhere; CI runs `./gradlew build` (compile only despite step name 'run tests'); zero actual unit tests.
rationale.D5: Confirmed `Telemetry` extends `DogLog` and `Telemetry.log` is called across 20+ files (Vision, Launcher, Swerve, etc.) with structured logging; discounted level 3 as no AdvantageKit `@AutoLog`/`processInputs` — DogLog is structured lightweight logging at level 2.
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlanner paths and autos (20+ competition paths) actually referenced via `PathPlannerAuto` and `AutoBuilder.followPath`; `AutoBuilder.pathfindToPoseFlipped` reactive pathfinding confirmed used in `Auton.pathfindingCommandToPose`; discounted full level 4 as repulsor/potential-field not present.
rationale.D7: Confirmed 3 Limelights using MegaTag1+2, `addVisionMeasurement` with dynamic per-condition std-dev tuning and multi-stage rejection logic, inverse-variance fusion of estimates, and `getPoseAtTimestamp` time-interpolated pose buffer used in vision fusion; discounted level 4 as vision not behind an IO interface and no standalone `RobotState` world-model class.
rationale.D8: Confirmed CI (build + javadoc deploy workflows), Spotless auto-formatter and SpotBugs static analysis in `build.gradle`, real README with feature descriptions, and `spectrumLib` as an in-repo carried library across seasons; discounted level 4 as `spectrumLib` is bundled in-repo not consumed as a versioned external dependency.
